title: helianthus buphthalmoides
intro: Helianthus buphthalmoides, also known as the ox eye daisy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Helianthus buphthalmoides include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Helianthus buphthalmoides can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat skin irritations, wounds, and other conditions.
